description.content: Manage item availability and 86ing (marking items as unavailable) in real time.
Updates the availability status of items and item options for a store. Used to 86 items (mark as unavailable) or stock them back in when they become available to order.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Create, update, and manage menus for stores on the DoorDash marketplace.

Uploads a complete menu for a store. Menu creation is processed asynchronously. A successful response indicates the request was received. A webhook notification is sent when processing completes or fails.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates an existing menu. Uses the same validation as menu creation. Processing is asynchronous with webhook notification upon completion.

Receive, confirm, update, and manage orders placed through the DoorDash marketplace.
Updates the status of an order, cancels items, adjusts item or option quantities, or substitutes items. A separate token may be required for patch_order_events operations.

variable.description: (Required) The unique DoorDash order identifier.

response.name: Order updated successfully

variable.description: (Required) The unique DoorDash order identifier.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The DoorDash Marketplace API allows merchants and third-party providers to integrate directly with the DoorDash marketplace for order management, menu synchronization, and store operations. It supports receiving orders from DoorDash, updating order statuses, and managing menu availability in real time. Access is granted through a selective partner program.

Contact Support:
 Name: DoorDash Developer Support
